name: @cfxdevkit/framework
description: Conflux DevKit monorepo — framework, platform, domains, projects.

scripts.gitnexus:analyze: pnpm run gitnexus:ensure && pnpm exec gitnexus analyze
scripts.gitnexus:list: pnpm run gitnexus:ensure && pnpm exec gitnexus list
scripts.gitnexus:status: pnpm run gitnexus:ensure && pnpm exec gitnexus status && pnpm exec gitnexus list
scripts.docs:sync: pnpm run tooling -- docs sync all
scripts.docs:enrich:all: pnpm run tooling -- docs enrich all
scripts.docs:enrich:api: pnpm run tooling -- docs enrich api
scripts.docs:enrich:readme: pnpm run tooling -- docs enrich readme
scripts.docs:enrich:packages: pnpm run tooling -- docs enrich packages
scripts.docs:enrich:structure: pnpm run tooling -- docs enrich structure
scripts.docs:enrich:content: pnpm run tooling -- docs enrich content
scripts.docs:probe:api: pnpm run tooling -- docs probe api
scripts.docs:validate-wiki: pnpm run tooling -- docs validate wiki
scripts.docs:validate-wiki-fix: pnpm run tooling -- docs validate wiki-fix
scripts.docs:validate-packages: pnpm run tooling -- docs validate content
scripts.sync:packages: pnpm run tooling -- docs sync packages
scripts.sync:architecture: pnpm run tooling -- docs sync architecture
scripts.sync:coverage: pnpm run tooling -- docs sync coverage
scripts.sync:wiki: pnpm run tooling -- docs sync wiki
scripts.llm:all: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory all
scripts.llm:actions: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory actions
scripts.llm:action: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory action
scripts.llm:changeset: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory changeset
scripts.llm:ci-cd: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory ci-cd
scripts.llm:docs-api: pnpm run cdk -- agent deterministic docs-api
scripts.llm:readme-upkeep: pnpm run cdk -- agent deterministic readme-upkeep
scripts.llm:package-pages: pnpm run cdk -- agent deterministic package-pages
scripts.llm:structure-upkeep: pnpm run cdk -- agent deterministic structure-upkeep
scripts.llm:docs-pipeline: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory docs-pipeline
scripts.llm:docs-upkeep: pnpm run cdk -- agent deterministic docs-upkeep
scripts.llm:health: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory health
scripts.llm:models: pnpm run cdk -- agent deterministic models
scripts.llm:validate-models: pnpm run cdk -- agent deterministic validate-models
scripts.llm:model: pnpm run cdk -- agent config set default-model
scripts.llm:release: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory release
scripts.llm:test-audit: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory test-audit
scripts.llm:test-upkeep: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory test-upkeep
scripts.llm:validation: pnpm run cdk -- agent exploratory validation
scripts.security:check: pnpm run security:audit && pnpm run check:secrets
